name: sgs-blocks
description: Custom Gutenberg block library for Small Giants Studio

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/generate-icons.js && node scripts/generate-extension-attributes.js && node scripts/check-dead-controls.js --check && node scripts/check-hardcoded-render-defaults.js --check && node scripts/check-control-ux.js --check && node scripts/check-product-search-guards.js && python scripts/check-composition-sync.py --check && python scripts/check-atomic-slug-literals.py --check && python scripts/ledger/declare_input.py --check && python -m pytest scripts/oracle/tests/ -q
scripts.prestart: node scripts/generate-icons.js && node scripts/generate-extension-attributes.js && node scripts/check-dead-controls.js --check && node scripts/check-hardcoded-render-defaults.js --check && node scripts/check-control-ux.js --check && node scripts/check-product-search-guards.js && python scripts/check-composition-sync.py --check && python scripts/check-atomic-slug-literals.py --check
